overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a futuristic, utilitarian bedroom or crew quarters with curved metal walls and built-in furniture. The character walks from the sleeping area to examine a desk with a vintage computer, then moves toward a window overlooking a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic crew quarters with sleeping area

agents.ego_description: walking from the bed area toward the desk, surveying the room

entered.detail: recessed sleeping platform with white pillows and dark bedding
curved wooden-topped desk with metal legs
simple yellow chair with metal frame
industrial gray metal paneling with rivets and seams
built-in wall compartments with small handles

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a compact, cylindrical room with industrial metal walls. A built-in bed occupies the right side while a desk with yellow chairs sits to the left. The character walks forward, approaching the desk area while the camera maintains a steady third-person follow.

scene_state.functional_zone: work desk with vintage computer terminal

events.description: character slows and circles around the desk to examine objects

agents.ego_description: examining the desk closely, focusing on the vintage computer and potted plant

entered.detail: old-style CRT monitor with keyboard on the desk
small green plant in brown pot beside the monitor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the desk, revealing a vintage computer terminal and a small potted plant. The camera circles slowly around the workspace, showing the curved metal walls and overhead storage lockers. The bed recedes into the background as the focus shifts to the desk details.

events.description: character turns away from desk toward the room exit and window

agents.ego_description: walking toward the door and window area at the far end of the room

entered.detail: large rectangular window showing adjacent corridor or room
black metal cart with stacked equipment and cables
white metal shelving unit with boxes and items
sliding door frame leading to hallway

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the desk and walks toward the room's far end, where a window reveals a view into an adjacent corridor. An equipment rack stands to the right and a white storage shelf to the left. The character approaches the door area, completing the survey of the quarters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a compact, industrial crew quarter that shifts from a sleeping area to a detailed workspace and finally toward an exit. It begins with the character walking forward through a cylindrical room, moving past a built-in bed on the right toward a desk with yellow chairs. As the character reaches the workspace, the camera circles slowly to highlight a vintage computer terminal and a small potted plant against the curved metal walls and overhead lockers. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the desk and advances toward the far end of the room, passing an equipment rack and a white storage shelf. The movement finally concludes as the character approaches a window that reveals a view into an adjacent corridor.
